title: dombeya × cayeuxii
intro: Dombeya × cayeuxii, also known as the 'Pink Silk Floss Tree', is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Sterculiaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, as it is used to treat various health conditions due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Dombeya × cayeuxii include reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing, making it a popular choice in traditional medicine. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or poultices, which are commonly used in folk medicine to treat a range of ailments.
